scenes.text: You sit down. You open your laptop. You have exactly one hour to get this done.
scenes.image_prompt: Person sitting at a clean desk with laptop open, determined expression, clock on wall showing deadline approaching, warm room lighting, cinematic

scenes.text: And then you see it. The loading circle. Spinning. Just spinning.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of laptop screen showing a browser loading spinner, buffering circle, frustrated reflection in the screen, blue screen glow, cinematic

scenes.text: You check the WiFi icon. Full bars. Lies.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of WiFi icon in menu bar showing full signal strength, next to a loading page that won't load, dramatic irony, cinematic close-up

scenes.text: You move to a different spot in the room like that's going to help.
scenes.image_prompt: Person carrying laptop to different corner of room, standing awkwardly holding it up near a window, desperate posture, comedic framing, cinematic

scenes.text: The WiFi gave you just enough hope to keep you sitting there. And that is the cruelest part.
scenes.image_prompt: Person slumped at desk, laptop showing half-loaded page frozen, defeated expression, late afternoon light fading, cinematic emotional
